title: Jonathan  P. Brisebois
content:
## Jonathan  P. Brisebois
People.ContactEmail jbrisebois@mccarthy.ca
- University of Alberta
Jonathan (Jon) Brisebois is an associate in our Business Law Group in Calgary. He maintains a general corporate practice, which includes corporate finance and securities, mergers and acquisitions, and corporate governance matters.
Jon advises clients on a variety of corporate transactions, such as private placements, public offerings, asset and share transactions, and corporate reorganizations. He also provides guidance on securities regulatory and corporate governance matters. Prior to becoming an associate, he summered and articled with McCarthy Tétrault.
Jon received his Juris Doctor (with distinction) from the University of Alberta,where he earned various awards for his academic achievements. During law school, he volunteered with the Edmonton Community Legal Centre and served as a Day Leader and Caseworker for the Civil and Family Law Projects at Student Legal Services of Edmonton. In his final year of law school, Jon completed an exchange at the University of Oslo. Prior to pursuing a legal career, Jon studied economics at the University of Alberta.
Jon was called to the Alberta bar in 2024 and is a member of the Law Society of Alberta, the Calgary Bar Association and the Canadian Bar Association.
